title: 逃げゆく風を追いかけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We discuss our strategy for the Japanese Derby.
While the track may appeal to Mejiro Bright's
strengths, she may find it difficult to establish her
own pace there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's when Mejiro Ryan brings in Ines Fujin to
partner run with Mejiro Bright.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Running against an Umamusume skilled in
controlling the race helps Mejiro Bright to pin
down the timing of her final dash. The training
session with her two "big sisters" turns out to be a
success.
